curation_notes: Patch modifies only one file (NERServlet.java). The fix validates the user-supplied classifier parameter against the loaded model map before reflecting it in response headers and processing. Pre-assigned class auth-bypass (from CWE-863 Incorrect Authorization) is correct: the vulnerability is that the server does not verify the classifier parameter is a valid/known resource before operating on it. No sibling files in the webapp directory contain the same vulnerability pattern (only JSP templates alongside the servlet).
